A Restaurant Notebook by Kenji Shih

Kenji Shoku-Sanpo

Tasting notes from restaurants across Taiwan — mostly Taichung. Each entry has dish photos, shop info (address, phone, hours), tasting notes, and a rating. Filter by cuisine or rating.

10 restaurants · 121 photos

Sort
City
Cuisine

  • The Oven

    Le Four (Lai Fa Xiao Guan)

    ★★★★★ 4.5 📍 South District, Taichung📅 2026 · French・Set Menu・Reservation Only

    Le Four—French for "the oven"—is where Chef James works his magic. Having spent years in Canada, he’s made oven-baked dishes his signature. Even the Chinese name, *Lai Fa* (萊法), carries a deep personal meaning; it’s a heartfelt tribute to his beloved grandmother, *Lai-Fa* (來發).

    Continue reading →

  • Heavenly Joy Lane

    Tin Lok Lane Bing Sutt

    ★★★★★ 4 📍 Zhubei City, Hsinchu County📅 2026 · Hong Kong・Cha chaan teng・Bing sutt・Noodles & rice

    If you’re in Zhubei, Hsinchu and craving a legit taste of Hong Kong, Tin Lok Lane is the spot to be. It’s a classic *Cha Chaan Teng*—a traditional Hong Kong-style café—run by a Hong Kong native who named it after the iconic Tin Lok Lane in Wan Chai. The vibe inside is pure nostalgia, making you feel like you’ve been transported straight to old-school Hong Kong.

    Continue reading →

  • Second Floor Cafe · Taichung Showtime Wenxin

    Second Floor (Er Lou)

    ★★★★★ 4 📍 Nantun District, Taichung📅 2026 · Brunch・Italian・American・Coffee

    Founded in 2008, Second Floor (貳樓, or *Er Lou*) originally started—as the name suggests—on the second story of an old Taipei apartment. It’s since become a local legend for its all-day brunch. Their Taichung Showtime Wenxin branch is one of their newest spots (opened in 2024), and it’s a total stunner. The "Future Urban Forest" theme is inspired by the nearby Central Park and Wenxin Forest Park, using lush greenery, mirrors, and glass to create a space that feels both modern and incredibly relaxing.

    Continue reading →

  • Let's Eat Together

    KAIFUN (Wenxin Branch)

    ★★★★★ 4.5 📍 Nantun District, Taichung📅 2026 · Sichuan・Chinese・Family Style

    If you’re craving that legit Sichuan kick, KAIFUN Together is a must-visit. Carrying on the torch from the legendary "Fuli Sichuan Cuisine," they specialize in that signature numbing heat. Their menu hits all the right notes: fresh, aromatic, "mā" (numbing), and "là" (spicy). The Wenxin branch is tucked away on the 6th floor of Showtime Live Taichung Wenxin, so you can head straight from the cinema to the table without even leaving the mall.

    Continue reading →

  • Mita Taiga Ranch · Hamburgers

    Okawa Ranch (Dàhé Mùchǎng) Hambagu Specialty Store - Nangang Global Mall Branch

    ★★★★★ 3.5 📍 Nangang District, Taipei📅 2026 · Japanese・Hamburg Steak・Set Meal

    Mita Taiga Bokujo is a Japanese-style *hamburg* (Japanese hamburger steak) specialist that made its Taiwan debut in 2023 at Global Mall Nangang. They stick to traditional hand-patted techniques, using a specific ratio of coarse and fine premium beef to lock in all that juice. To top it off, the chef has crafted eight unique signature sauces to pair with your meal.

    Continue reading →

  • Choicemeal Dali

    Cho Mi (Cuo Mi) Kung Fu Cuisine · Signature Soup (Dali Branch)

    ★★★★★ 4.5 📍 Dali District, Taichung📅 2026 · Craft cuisine・Taiwanese・Family-style・Signature soup

    Choicemeal (厝秘) is all about "Gongfu" dishes and signature soups—essentially the high-skill, time-intensive heavy hitters of Taiwanese cuisine. At its heart, the restaurant is a tribute to the legacy of the "Zong-pu-shi" (the master chefs behind traditional outdoor banquets known as "Ban-zhuo"), taking those rustic feast traditions and elevating them into a refined dining experience. Their Dali branch on Guoguang Road is tucked right near the local flower market, housed in a stunning standalone building. It features several VIP private rooms, each with floor-to-ceiling windows looking out onto a zen Japanese garden with manicured pines.

    Continue reading →

  • Jeju Mr. KIM · Korean Fried Chicken

    Mr.KIM Korean Cuisine (Jeju Jin Xian Sheng)

    ★★★★★ 4 📍 Dali District, Taichung📅 2026 · Korean・Fried Chicken・Korean Cuisine・Ramen

    If you find yourself in Taichung’s Dali District and craving some serious Korean soul food, Mr. KIM (濟州金先生) is the place to be. Running strong since 2014, the owner—originally from Jeju Island—brought his mother’s traditional recipes straight to Taiwan. They specialize in crispy Korean fried chicken, comforting tofu stews, chewy rice cakes, and savory pork bowls. Everything is made fresh with strictly no MSG, which is why it’s become such a beloved local neighborhood favorite.

    Continue reading →

  • King Rice Bowl Korean Restaurant

    King Rice Bowl Korean Rice Bowls (King Rice Bowl Hánshì Dòngfàn)

    ★★★★★ 4 📍 Zhongshan District, Taipei City📅 2026 · Korean・Korean Bowl・Jajangmyeon・Korean Cuisine

    Tucked away in the narrow alleys of Taipei’s Zhongshan District, King Rice Bowl (킹덮밥 한식당) is a total hidden gem on Chang’an East Road. Located right near the bustling Zhongshan "2.0" food street, this cozy spot is run by a mostly Korean staff serving up authentic, home-style comfort food. It’s the kind of place that has built a massive local following strictly through word-of-mouth thanks to its legit flavors and super fair prices.

    Continue reading →

  • Cat Boss · Cat-Themed & Pet-Friendly Restaurant

    Cat Boss Cafe (貓老闆咖啡)

    ★★★★★ 4 📍 Dali District, Taichung📅 2026 · Italian・Casual Dining・Cafe・Pet-friendly

    If you’re hanging out in Taichung’s Dali District, make sure to swing by Cat Boss (貓老闆咖啡). It’s a super chill, cat-themed, pet-friendly cafe right on Dali Road, just a short walk from Dali Sports Park. The stars of the show are the many friendly rescue cats roaming around, always ready for some attention while you enjoy your meal. You can even pick up some cat treats in-store to win them over! While you can bring your own pets, the vibe here is definitely all about the cats.

    Continue reading →

  • 12MOON · Taichung Guihe Branch

    12MOON - Congee, Tea & Special Dishes (Shi Er Yue - Guihe Branch)

    ★★★★★ 4 📍 West District, Taichung📅 2026 · Congee・Taiwanese・Private Kitchen・Claypot Congee・Tea House

    12MOON (十二月) Guihe Branch is easily the brand’s most stunning location, tucked away in the West District of Taichung. Housed in a gorgeous 1951 retro mansion—formerly a Maryknoll Sisters facility—this 70-year-old gem keeps its history alive with classic terrazzo floors (traditional speckled stone flooring) and warm wood interiors. Surrounded by a lush garden and featuring cozy private rooms, it’s got that perfect nostalgic vibe for a big family feast or a long-overdue catch-up with your besties.

    Continue reading →

Kenji Shoku-Sanpo · by Kenji Shih
